articles.title: The Age-Verification Trap
articles.summary: Social media is going the way of alcohol, gambling, and other social sins: Societies are deciding it’s no longer kid stuff. articles.title: Jimi Hendrix Was a Systems Engineer
articles.summary: 3 February 1967 is a day that belongs in the annals of music history. It’s the day that Jimi Hendrix entered London’s Olympic Studios to record a song using a new component.
